titleStmt.title: SII 23.100: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 100. (A.R. No. 100 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the west wall of the Goddess shrine Mār. Sundara-Pāṇḍya I: year 5: 1220-21 A.D.

summary.p: This is dated in the 5th year of Māṟavarman Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva (I) ‘who took the Chōḷa country’ (acc. A.D. 1216), and records a gift of 7 achchu invested with the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of Nālāyira-Īśvaramuḍaiyār at Kallaḍaikkuṟichchi by a lady devotee by name Kuṉṟameṟinda-Perumāḷ-Ammai for the expenses of offerings to some deities (names lost) set up in the temple by the donor, and one achchu in addition for burning a twilight lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāna tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭa śrī cuntarapāṇṭi
ya[ devaṟ] kku yāṇṭu 5vatu vaikācimāsam muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīrā
jarājacaturvedimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai kalliṭakkuṟicci Uṭaiyār nālāyira Īcuramuṭai
vabrāhmaṇaṇaṉ caṭṭaṉ māṉaticuramuṭaiyāṉ virāparaṇapaṭṭaṉum cayapperumāḷ
ḷāṉa kirāmarājappaṭṭaṉum poṉṉampi veḷḷantāṅkiṉāṉ tiruc ciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉum poṉṉampi Umai
yāḻvāṉṉāṉa Āyirattaḷipaṭṭaṉum po lāyamuṭaiyāṉāṉa kūpaka
rāyapaṭṭaṉum kaṇṇāḷaṉ paṭṭaṉāṉa Aññu ṭaṉum Eccavarākaṉāṉa
mālāṉa kotukulapaṭṭaṉum Eccavarākaṉpaṭṭa paṭṭaṉum Umai yāḻvāṉ
Āviṉkaṉṟāṉa ṉiyāyaparipālapaṭṭaṉum ciṟiyāṉ cevakattevaṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyira
paṭṭaṉum ttrayaṉum Ivvaṉaivomum Ikkoyi ṭiyāril coṟāḻvi Aḻakiya
ṉācciyāṉa kuṉṟameṟintaperumāḷammai Ikkoyilil Eḻun taruḷivitta perumāḷukkum
perumāḷukku nāḷḷoṉṟukku Amutupaṭi Arici
Irunāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu miḷakamutu neyyamutu tayira
mutum Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilaiyamutu Āka Innimantam
cantirātittapakaṟ celvatāka Ivaḷ tanta Accu Eḻum canti
yātipam nimantañ celkaikkut tanta Accu Oṉṟum Āka I
vvaccu Eṭṭum nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu celuttuvomākavum
Ikkoyiliṟ kuṭaṅkoṭu koyilpukuvār Ittevai celuttu
vārkaḷāṉamaikkum Ippaṭi cammatittu Ipporuḷ
kaikkoṇṭu kallil veṭṭikkuṭuttom kuṉ
ṟameṟintaperumāḷ Ammaikku Ippaṭikku Ivai
caṭṭaṉ māṉeticcaramuṭaiyāṉāṉa virāparaṇapaṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kivai caṭṭaṉ perumāḷāṉa kirāmarācapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai poṉṉampi veḷḷantāṅkiṉā
ṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
